reason: Mermaid security advisories GHSA-87f9-hvmw-gh4p and GHSA-x3vm-38hw-55wf require diagram-level config to be unable to override CSS-bearing theme keys.
Local Class parity uses Mermaid's observed class node padding baseline; upstream schema still lists 5.
Normalize the deprecated nullable flowchart htmlLabels schema default to the effective Mermaid baseline used by local renderers.
Mermaid defaultConfig.ts replaces the schema elk object with runtime defaults that omit cycleBreakingStrategy, so elkjs uses ELK Layered's GREEDY default unless users set it explicitly.
Mermaid defaultConfig.ts exposes this key as undefined for configKeys; local JSON uses an empty object as the equivalent default map.
Ishikawa upstream SVG baselines use max-width sizing by default, so the generated default config must retain the runtime max-width default.
Pinned Mermaid Sankey baselines render the default SVG with width=100% and max-width styling, so the generated default config must keep the runtime max-width default enabled.
Local Architecture FCoSE parity keeps Mermaid's deterministic seed default proven by architecture specs and local tests.
Pie parity implements donutHole behavior; keep the runtime default in generated JSON when schema/default extraction would omit it.
Pie parity implements highlightSlice behavior; keep the runtime default in generated JSON when schema/default extraction would omit it.
Pie parity implements legendPosition behavior; keep the runtime default in generated JSON when schema/default extraction would omit it.
Wardley config exists in Mermaid's schema, but the Wardley family is not admitted in the local inventory.
